problem id: 8b85ff03
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(7) OR NOT SHR(5)

examples:
  11111111 -> 11111001
  00110111 -> 11111110
  00111011 -> 11111110
  10011001 -> 11111011
  00110001 -> 11111110
  11000011 -> 11111001
  00011100 -> 11111111
  10111100 -> 11111011

query: 00001010
predicted answer: 11111111
